name: Stuffed Shells Florentine
recipeIngredient: 24 jumbo pasta shells, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium high heat, sauté mushrooms, onions, garlic, Italian seasoning, and pepper in margarine until tender. Remove from heat.
2. Stir in cottage cheese, spinach, and Egg Beaters.
3. Spoon the mixture into shells.
4. Spread 1/2 cup spaghetti sauce in the bottom of a 13X9X2 inch baking dish.
5. Arrange shells over sauce.
6. Top with remaining sauce; cover.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes or until hot from the Frozen Assets List by frozen-assets@xc.org (Tom&Carol Hogan) on Jul 28, 1998.
